parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  customer_name,
  email,
  service,
  appointment_time,
  status,
  confirmed,
  confirmation_token,
  CONCAT('https://n8n.systack.net/webhook/systack-confirm-booking?token=', confirmation_token) AS confirm_link
FROM bookings
WHERE
  confirmed = FALSE
  AND COALESCE(reminder_24h_sent, FALSE) = FALSE
  AND status NOT IN ('canceled', 'cancelled', 'completed', 'no_show')
  AND appointment_time - INTERVAL '24 hours' <= NOW()
  AND appointment_time > NOW() + INTERVAL '2 hours'
ORDER BY appointment_time ASC
LIMIT 50;

parameters.subject: =Reminder: confirm your appointment tomorrow
parameters.html:
=

Confirm your appointment

Hey {{ $json.customer_name }},

This is a reminder that you are scheduled for:

  • Service: {{ $json.service }}
  • Time: {{ $json.appointment_time }}

Please confirm your appointment:

Confirm Appointment

Customers that do not confirm will lose their appointment slot.

Thank you.

parameters.query:
UPDATE bookings
SET
  reminder_24h_sent = TRUE,
  reminder_24h_sent_at = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('Postgres - Find 24H Due Reminders').item.json.id }}
RETURNING *;
